author: Matt
msg:
I remember Josh addressing it on a previous event. My understanding was that the task parameters are being dictated by the client. Sometimes farms may be beneficial for certain tasks or certain clients...other times they dont want repetition for a particular task. There may be times where certain tasks put farms in the in a great position but it depends on what the client is buying.
Thats probably why they try not to give guidance on the setups. From their standpoint..what is acceptable to one uno versus another can be subjective...especially when you consider time frame to mature ecosystem.
